name: Indian GSTIN (GST Identification Number)
description: Detects Indian Goods and Services Tax Identification Numbers. Format: 2-digit state code (01-37) + PAN structure (5 letters + 4 digits + 1 letter) + registration digit + Z + check character.

metadata.format: 15 characters: 2-digit state code + PAN (10 chars) + registration digit + Z + check char
metadata.official_name: Goods and Services Tax Identification Number (GSTIN)
metadata.note: State code 01-37 and mandatory Z at position 14 validated by regex structure
